name: Chanty Team Communication API
what_it_does: Team messaging and task management platform with webhook and bot API — enabling teams to communicate via channels, direct messages, and threads, with integrated task management from messages, voice and video calls, and API support for incoming webhooks and bot integrations, as a Slack alternative with built-in task management.
use_cases: Sending team notifications via Chanty Incoming Webhook for CI/CD and monitoring alerts
Building bot integrations via Chanty Bot API for automated workflow notifications
Converting messages to tasks via Chanty for integrated team communication and task tracking
Team communication for budget-conscious teams via Chanty as Slack alternative
Integrating external services with Chanty via webhook for team notification aggregation
not_for: Enterprise with complex compliance and security requirements (use Slack Enterprise or Microsoft Teams)
Teams needing full Slack API with message reading and user management
Large-scale messaging with thousands of users requiring enterprise features
best_when: A small team needs an affordable team messaging tool with built-in task management — where Chanty's message-to-task conversion reduces context switching between chat and project management tools.
avoid_when: You need enterprise security features, extensive app ecosystem, or full REST API for message reading.

auth.notes: Incoming webhooks: unique webhook URL (webhook URL is the auth credential). Bot API with token. No full REST API for data retrieval. Limited to posting messages via webhook and bot responses. No OAuth2. Very limited API compared to Slack. Primarily webhook-driven.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: unlimited messages, 20GB storage, unlimited integrations
pricing.notes: Ukrainian company (Kyiv). Founded 2016. Bootstrapped. Slack alternative with task management. Unique feature: convert any message into a task directly. Voice messages built-in. Audio/video calls. 40,000+ teams. Integrations: Google Drive, Dropbox, Trello, GitHub, Jira (via Zapier). Task management integrated with chat (differentiated from Slack). Very competitive pricing ($3/user vs Slack $7.25). Used by: SMBs, agencies, remote teams. Note: Ukrainian company — data residency considerations.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Webhooks only (no full REST API). Bot API for responses. Very limited API compared to Slack. GDPR. Ukrainian company. US data hosting. Free plan available. Not suitable for message read access or complex integrations.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message posting via webhook: not idempotent — duplicates possible. No read API. Implement application-level deduplication.
known_agent_gotchas: No REST API — only incoming webhooks (post messages) and basic bot responses
Cannot READ messages via API — only post; unsuitable for message retrieval or analytics
Incoming webhook URL is the auth credential — protect as secret
Ukrainian company — data may be hosted in US; check for EU compliance requirements
API documentation is very limited — primarily webhook posting
Task management feature is UI-only — no API for task creation/management

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR claimed. Ukrainian company. US data hosting. Webhook URL as auth. No OAuth2. Very limited API surface. Team chat data (internal communications) is sensitive. Young company with limited security audit history.
